title: Update regarding Companies house fee changes
body: "As of 1st February 2026, the following fees will now apply to those wishing to register as a Community Interest Company:   Incorporation online - £115 (currently £65) Incorporation by paper - £139 (currently £86)   You can find out more about the fee changes here:  Companies House fees are changing from 1 February 2026 - GOV.UK "
